introSection: Dragonfly is a steel roller coaster in the Dutch amusement park Duinrell.

sections.title: Information
sections.content: On the front of the trains, the logo of the coaster is visible. The coaster operates a single train with two riders on each of the twelve rows, giving it a capacity of 24 people for each ride. The coaster was built by the German company Gerstlauer and was opened on 31 March 2012.

fullText:
Dragonfly is a steel roller coaster in the Dutch amusement park Duinrell.

On the front of the trains, the logo of the coaster is visible. The coaster operates a single train with two riders on each of the twelve rows, giving it a capacity of 24 people for each ride. The coaster was built by the German company Gerstlauer and was opened on 31 March 2012.
